# Power Automate Released Versions

Latest Update: Power Automate 2508.2 - August 25, 2025
Releases rolled out incrementally across regions.

Multiple versions deployed with worldwide availability schedule.
Version history spans from 2021 to 2025 with weekly releases.

Last updated: 2025-09-02
